auth.label: API Key
auth.description: GIPHY API key passed as the api_key query parameter. Create an app in the GIPHY Developer Dashboard: https://developers.giphy.com/dashboard/.

actions.name: get_gif
actions.description: Get a GIPHY GIF by GIF Object id. This is not the random_id value.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

source_tld.description: The top-level domain of the source.

is_sticker.description: Whether the item is a sticker.

mp4_size.description: The MP4 file size in bytes.

webp_size.description: The WebP file size in bytes.

images.description: The image rendition variants keyed by name.

actions.name: get_random_gif
actions.description: Fetch a random GIPHY GIF, optionally filtered by tag.

source_tld.description: The top-level domain of the source.

is_sticker.description: Whether the item is a sticker.

mp4_size.description: The MP4 file size in bytes.

webp_size.description: The WebP file size in bytes.

images.description: The image rendition variants keyed by name.

actions.name: get_random_id
actions.description: Create a GIPHY random_id value for personalization across requests.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

randomId.description: The generated random ID for personalization.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
